suggest.illuminate/http: Required to convert collections to API resources (^12.0).
suggest.symfony/var-dumper: Required to use the dump method (^7.2).

suggest.ext-fileinfo: Required to use the Filesystem class.
suggest.ext-ftp: Required to use the Flysystem FTP driver.
suggest.ext-hash: Required to use the Filesystem class.
suggest.league/flysystem: Required to use the Flysystem local driver (^3.25.1).
suggest.league/flysystem-aws-s3-v3: Required to use the Flysystem S3 driver (^3.25.1).
suggest.league/flysystem-ftp: Required to use the Flysystem FTP driver (^3.25.1).
suggest.league/flysystem-sftp-v3: Required to use the Flysystem SFTP driver (^3.25.1).
suggest.psr/http-message: Required to allow Storage::put to accept a StreamInterface (^1.0).
suggest.symfony/filesystem: Required to enable support for relative symbolic links (^7.2).
suggest.symfony/mime: Required to enable support for guessing extensions (^7.2).

suggest.illuminate/console: Required to use the session:table command (^12.0).

suggest.illuminate/filesystem: Required to use the Composer class (^12.0).
suggest.laravel/serializable-closure: Required to use the once function (^1.3|^2.0).
suggest.league/commonmark: Required to use Str::markdown() and Stringable::markdown() (^2.7).
suggest.league/uri: Required to use the Uri class (^7.5.1).
suggest.symfony/process: Required to use the Composer class (^7.2).
suggest.symfony/var-dumper: Required to use the dd function (^7.2).
suggest.vlucas/phpdotenv: Required to use the Env class and env helper (^5.6.1).

suggest.ext-exif: Recommended to be able to read EXIF data properly.
